# V2 checkpoint fixture

This fixture is a reduced copy of
`kernel/tests/data/v2-checkpoints-parquet-with-sidecars.tar.zst` from
delta-kernel-rs v0.23.0. The upstream fixture was generated by Delta Spark.

Only the version 6 checkpoint manifest, its two sidecars, and
`_last_checkpoint` are retained. The data files are intentionally omitted
because the regression test validates checkpoint and sidecar expansion without
opening the active data files.
